queries.question: List company from fortune500_companies where assets m is at most 4340.1.
List company from fortune500_companies where ceo is one of Christopher A. Caldwell, Malcolm C. Roberts, Gordon J. Hardie, Gary S. Guthart, and 6 more.
queries.sql: SELECT "company" FROM "fortune500_companies" WHERE "ceo" IN ('Christopher A. Caldwell', 'Malcolm C. Roberts', 'Gordon J. Hardie', 'Gary S. Guthart', 'Charles Liang', 'A. James Teague/W. Randall Fowler', 'Patricia K. Poppe', 'Mikael Bratt', 'Milan Galik', 'Niraj S. Shah');

List company from fortune500_companies where industry equals Semiconductors and Other Electronic Components.
queries.sql: SELECT "company" FROM "fortune500_companies" WHERE "industry" = 'Semiconductors and Other Electronic Components';
